lines.text: Ha, hahaha... I must admit, you have an annoyingly good memory.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: It's remarkable that someone of your rank would remember a man such as myself.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Sadly, I've no desire to be remembered. To me, Montelli is only a name of the past.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: There were moments of joy, but they cannot make up for my loss... now I only feel tired.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family
If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: To grieve for my last friend in the family? To blame him for being so reckless and greedy?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Or to figure out how this fool ended up in such a mess, hoping to find the lost items and settling his debts, so he may rest in peace?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I tried to persuade him to leave with me, but failed. In Ragunna's game, the Montelli family has only two options.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: We either play to win, or are forced to leave with nothing.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Every Montelli has a chance at their desires, but what's the price... They stake everything they hold dear—family, love, faith, principles, and even their life.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Now... his ambition and greed have cost him everything.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: ...In that case, you might want to speak to Scarlet Velvet.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The leader of a network of commoners seeking freedom in Ragunna City. They had close ties with Benett. If he was really stealing, I'd wager they were complicit.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: That said, with their recent fallout with the family, I can't guarantee you'll find them, let alone talk to them.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: What's in it? Carlotta.. What will happen to her?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: What's in it? Carlotta.. What will happen to her?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family
